title: UPI Intent Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for the UPI Intent flow via Razorpay. The buyer selects a UPI app, the platform deep-links using a upi:// intent URL, and the buyer authorizes the payment in their UPI app. The resulting Razorpay payment proof is submitted as the credential.

available_upi_intent_instrument.title: Available UPI Intent Instrument
available_upi_intent_instrument.description: Declares support for UPI Intent flow in handler available_instruments.

upi_apps.description: Restrict to specific UPI apps (e.g., ['gpay', 'phonepe', 'paytm', 'bhim']). If absent, all apps supported by Razorpay are eligible.

type.description: Instrument type discriminator. Always 'upi_intent' for this handler.

credential.description: Razorpay payment proof from the SDK callback after the buyer authorizes payment in their UPI app.

display.description: Display information about the UPI payment for rendering in order history and receipts.

upi_app.description: Identifier of the UPI app the buyer used (e.g., 'gpay', 'phonepe', 'paytm', 'bhim').

description.description: Human-readable description shown in order summary (e.g., 'UPI — Google Pay').
